{"perspective": "Assessment Science", 
"findings": [{"file_path": "apps/api/app/routers/grievance.py", 
"what_exists": "A formal grievance intake and admin review endpoint", 
"what_it_does": "Allows users to file grievances about their AURA scores and provides a documented contest path. Admins can review, transition status, and set resolutions.", 
"quality_assessment": "Meets Constitution requirements for grievance handling. Well-structured and readable code."}], 
"summary": "The grievance endpoint is compliant with ISO 10667-2 §7 and the Constitution. It provides a clear and structured process for users to file grievances and for admins to review and resolve them.", 
"next_files_to_read": ["docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "apps/api/app/core/assessment/engine.py"], 
"whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.what_exists: A formal grievance intake and admin review endpoint
findings.what_it_does: Allows users to file grievances about their AURA scores and provides a documented contest path. Admins can review, transition status, and set resolutions.
findings.quality_assessment: Meets Constitution requirements for grievance handling. Well-structured and readable code.

summary: The grievance endpoint is compliant with ISO 10667-2 §7 and the Constitution. It provides a clear and structured process for users to file grievances and for admins to review and resolve them.
